product: Genie interface, query, and data improvements
tagline: Editable filters displays multiple values: Editable filters now display multiple values when Genie generates a SQL filter clause that includes more than one filter value.
what_it_does: Editable filters displays multiple values: Editable filters now display multiple values when Genie generates a SQL filter clause that includes more than one filter value. Edit space descriptions: You can now edit Genie Space descriptions directly in place. SQL query recommendation: Genie now suggests popular SQL queries that come from notebooks.
why_it_matters: Faster entity matching identification: Entity matching (previously value dictionaries) now identifies unique values faster.
plain_summary: Editable filters displays multiple values: Editable filters now display multiple values when Genie generates a SQL filter clause that includes more than one filter value. Edit space descriptions: You can now edit Genie Space descriptions directly in place.
key_takeaway: Editable filters displays multiple values: Editable filters now display multiple values when Genie generates a SQL filter clause that includes more than one filter value.
